strategies.name: full-image 2x2 overlap
strategies.crop_generation_without_ground_truth: four 62 percent image tiles anchored at image corners
strategies.intended_recovery: building pieces, dense/small targets, smoke/debris targets

strategies.name: generic dense-row strips
strategies.crop_generation_without_ground_truth: middle-lower and lower full-width strips from image geometry only
strategies.intended_recovery: dense row and lower-band small objects

strategies.name: prediction-anchored neighbor crops
strategies.crop_generation_without_ground_truth: padded crops around the three largest locked baseline detections
